case_title: CHARLES FAISON VS. AARON PAUL EXECUTIVE CONSULTANTS, INC., A

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FAISON, CHARLES AS TO DEFENDANT AARON PAUL EXECUTIVE CONSULTANTS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, DBA  BIG BROTHER PROTECTIVE SERVICES JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
